description: This file defines the RcaRepository interface, a Spring Data JPA repository for managing Rca entities, including a custom method to find Rca by defect ID.

classes.name: RcaRepository
classes.description: A Spring Data JPA repository interface for Rca entity, providing CRUD operations and custom query method.

methods.name: findByDefectId
methods.description: Retrieves an Optional containing the Rca entity associated with the specified defect ID.
